'''Opdoa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A member of the [[Goa-Ato/Legends|Goa-Ato]], Opdoa served on a committee that matched hunters with [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]]. It was he and [[Nilesk]] who sent [[Fask Eelak]] of the [[An'yettu clan]] to apprehend the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Gerraba]].

==Appearances==
